title: Horse Spawn
description: Spawns a saddled horse near you when entering a world for the first time!
body:
**Horse Spawn** is a simple mod that spawns a saddled horse or donkey (or any other companion mob) near the player when entering a world for the first time. It is completely server-side, so players don't have to install the mod. You can still use the mod in singleplayer.

**Config (horse-spawn.json):**
- Choose the companion mob (default: Horse)
- Comes saddled (default: true)
- Comes with a chest (default: true)
- Only spawn once (default: true)
- Overwrite random stats (default: false)
- Manual Stats 

**Dependencies:**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Required)
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl), [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional: Singleplayer Config GUI)
